studio.resumeAiEditTitle: Hand this draft back to the AI Edit overlay
studio.testButtonTitle: Test this agent against a sample task

deleteConfirm.title: Delete agent "{{agentId}}"?
deleteConfirm.description: This removes the .md from disk. Version history stays in the DB — use a fresh custom agent if you want to recover the body later.

validation.namePattern: Name must start with custom- and contain only lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens.
validation.missingFrontmatter: Missing YAML frontmatter (needs opening --- on the first line).

testPane.placeholder: Describe what the agent should do, or pick a sample above.
testPane.emptyHint: Run a sample task against the current draft. Output appears here.

versions.empty: No prior versions recorded for this agent.
versions.restoreHint: Click a version to restore its body into the editor (you still need to Save).

refine.headline: Refine your agent
refine.placeholderInitial: Describe how to refine this agent…
refine.openInStudio: Open draft in Studio for manual editing

validation.multipleDefaultRules: Routing may have at most one default rule (found {{found}})
validation.defaultRuleNotLast: The default routing rule must be the last entry
validation.unknownRoutingAgent: Routing references agent not in the chain: {{agent}}
validation.invalidTags: Routing rule {{agent}} has invalid tags: {{tags}} (use lowercase kebab-case)

orchestrator.heading: Orchestrator
orchestrator.description: Top-level model for both commands. batch-implement delegates to implement per feature, so every rail it spawns inherits this profile's agent chain.

agentChain.heading: Agent chain ({{n}})
agentChain.addTitle: Add an agent from the catalog
agentChain.addDisabledTitle: All catalog agents are already in the chain
agentChain.emptyCatalog: No more agents in the catalog. Add custom agents from the Agents Catalog tab.

routing.heading: Routing ({{n}})
routing.needAgentsTitle: Add at least one agent before creating routing rules
routing.explainer: First matching rule wins. Rules are editable and removable, and the default catch-all stays last when present. If you leave routing empty, the pipeline falls back to the first developer-shaped agent in the chain.
routing.untargetedDetail: No routing rule points to: <mono>{{agents}}</mono>. Add a tag rule or retarget the default rule if you want them to run.

agentRow.pinnedFirstTitle: Pinned to first position — pipeline always starts with sr-architect
agentRow.pinnedLastTitle: Pinned to last position — merge phase always runs last
agentRow.requiredRemoveTitle: Required baseline agent — the pipeline depends on this row

routingRow.coreDefaultTitle: Core fallback — the pipeline's last-resort rule, pinned to sr-developer

sr-architect.name: Architect
sr-architect.description: Architecture design, change specs, implementation planning

sr-reviewer.name: Reviewer
sr-reviewer.description: General code review — the final quality gate

sr-product-manager.name: Product Manager
sr-product-manager.description: Product discovery, VPC personas, backlog management

sr-product-analyst.name: Product Analyst
sr-product-analyst.description: Backlog analysis, spec gap analysis, reporting

sr-doc-sync.name: Doc Sync
sr-doc-sync.description: Documentation sync — keeps docs aligned with code

sr-merge-resolver.name: Merge Resolver
sr-merge-resolver.description: Merge conflict resolution with context awareness

security-reviewer.label: Security Reviewer
security-reviewer.blurb: Finds auth, injection, and data-exposure bugs in a diff before it ships.

performance-profiler.label: Performance Profiler
performance-profiler.blurb: Finds hot paths, N+1 queries, unbounded loops, bundle bloat.

data-engineer.label: Data Engineer
data-engineer.blurb: Schema migrations, ETL pipelines, data transformations.

ui-ux-polisher.label: UI / UX Polisher
ui-ux-polisher.blurb: Accessibility, spacing, empty states, error handling.

api-designer.label: API Designer
api-designer.blurb: Versioning, pagination, error shapes, backward compatibility.

database-architect.label: Database Architect
database-architect.blurb: Indexes, normalization vs denormalization, query shapes.

accessibility-auditor.label: Accessibility Auditor
accessibility-auditor.blurb: WCAG 2.2 review: contrast, focus, ARIA, keyboard.

qa-test-strategist.label: QA Test Strategist
qa-test-strategist.blurb: Test plans: unit / integration / E2E split, coverage gaps.

load-tester.label: Load / Stress Tester
load-tester.blurb: Capacity planning, k6 / Locust scenarios, bottleneck hunting.

regression-hunter.label: Regression Hunter
regression-hunter.blurb: Bisects, repros, writes the failing test first.

data-analyst.label: Data Analyst
data-analyst.blurb: Turns vague questions into queries + readable findings.

iac-reviewer.label: IaC / Cloud Reviewer
iac-reviewer.blurb: Terraform / CloudFormation: IAM, public exposure, costs.

compliance-reviewer.label: Compliance Reviewer
compliance-reviewer.blurb: GDPR / SOC2 / HIPAA-adjacent checks on data flows.

ux-researcher.label: UX Researcher
ux-researcher.blurb: Interview scripts, usability test plans, synthesis.

technical-writer.label: Technical Writer
technical-writer.blurb: Docs that are actually read — tutorials, references, changelogs.

design-reviewer.label: Design System Reviewer
design-reviewer.blurb: Token drift, component misuse, consistency across flows.

financial-analyst.label: Financial Analyst
financial-analyst.blurb: Unit economics, cohort models, scenario analysis.

seo-auditor.label: SEO Auditor
seo-auditor.blurb: Technical + content SEO: indexability, IA, intent match.

growth-hacker.label: Growth Experimenter
growth-hacker.blurb: Funnel diagnosis, lift experiments, activation loops.

social-strategist.label: Social Media Strategist
social-strategist.blurb: Channel-fit content, editorial calendar, voice consistency.

literature-reviewer.label: Literature Reviewer
literature-reviewer.blurb: Systematic review summaries, citation graphs, conflicts.

statistical-analyst.label: Statistical Analyst
statistical-analyst.blurb: Chooses the right test, reports effect sizes, not just p-values.

scientific-writer.label: Scientific Writer
scientific-writer.blurb: IMRaD structure, honest limits, readable abstracts.

assessment-author.label: Assessment Author
assessment-author.blurb: Items that measure understanding, not recall.

tutor-explainer.label: Tutor / Explainer
tutor-explainer.blurb: Feynman-style simple explanations with worked examples.

clinical-guideline-reviewer.label: Clinical Guideline Reviewer
clinical-guideline-reviewer.blurb: Map practice against latest evidence-based guidelines.

medical-summarizer.label: Medical Literature Summarizer
medical-summarizer.blurb: Abstracts to clinicians: what changed, evidence quality.

protocol-designer.label: Protocol Designer
protocol-designer.blurb: Clinical protocols: endpoints, inclusion criteria, safety.

contract-reviewer.label: Contract Reviewer
contract-reviewer.blurb: Flags risky clauses; explains what they actually mean.

privacy-counsel.label: Privacy Counsel
privacy-counsel.blurb: GDPR / CCPA / LGPD applied to concrete flows.

copy-editor.label: Copy Editor
copy-editor.blurb: Line edits: voice, cadence, cut 30% without losing meaning.

brand-voice-guardian.label: Brand Voice Guardian
brand-voice-guardian.blurb: Enforces voice rules; catches off-brand phrasing.

creative-brainstormer.label: Creative Brainstormer
creative-brainstormer.blurb: Divergent then convergent; kills sacred cows politely.

strategic-planner.label: Strategic Planner
strategic-planner.blurb: Goals → bets → metrics; prunes pet projects.

coach-1on1.label: 1:1 Coach
coach-1on1.blurb: Helps frame feedback, career growth, difficult conversations.

meeting-facilitator.label: Meeting Facilitator
meeting-facilitator.blurb: Agendas that produce decisions, not updates.
